---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new idea or enhancement for CardioGuard.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm frustrated when..."

**Describe the Solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe Alternatives Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Clinical / Scientific Rationale (if applicable)**
Does this feature add a new medical classification, filter, or visualization? Provide papers or references if appropriate.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or mockups about the feature request here.
